title: Axo-Chat

body:
![AxoChat info](https://i.imgur.com/SluPJkv.png)


## 🗨️ AxoChat – Advanced Chat Management Plugin

AxoChat is a powerful and advanced chat plugin for Minecraft designed to completely enhance server communication. It provides a modern, customizable, and secure chat system with multiple tools for interaction, moderation, and automation.

Whether you run a small SMP or a large network, AxoChat gives you full control over how players communicate.

## ✨ Key Features

### 🎨 Advanced Chat Formatting

* Customize messages using HEX colors, MiniMessage, and PlaceholderAPI.
* Create formats based on ranks, worlds, or permissions.

### 💬 Private Messaging System

* Includes `/msg`, `/r`, `/ignore`, and `/spy` with full control.

### 👥 Chat Channels

* Global, staff, trade, or fully custom channels.

### 🛡️ Advanced Chat Filters

* Anti-Advertising (blocks IPs, domains, links)
* Word Filter (custom censor system)
* Caps Control (prevents excessive uppercase)
* Anti-Spam (detects repeated messages)
* Advanced Anti-Link (detects shorteners like bit.ly)

### 🔔 Mentions System

* Notify players with sound, highlight, and visual effects.

### 🤖 Integrated ChatBot

* Automated responses and basic interaction with players.

### 📢 Announcements System

* Scheduled broadcasts with priority and delay support.

### ⚰️ Custom Death Messages

* Fully configurable based on death cause.

### 🔄 Join & Quit Messages

* Personalized messages with PlaceholderAPI support.

### 👁️ Staff Tools

* Staff Chat (private channel)
* Spy Mode (monitor private messages)
* Mute System (global or per channel)

### 💡 Extra Features

* ActionBar alerts
* BossBar announcements (optional)
* Chat bubbles (optional)
* AFK system with auto-detection

### ⚙️ Integrations

* PlaceholderAPI (required)
* LuckPerms (rank-based formats)
* Vault (economy support)
* bStats (anonymous stats)

## 🎯 Why AxoChat?

AxoChat is built to be flexible, optimized, and easy to configure, making it perfect for any type of server looking to upgrade their chat experience.

## ⚙️ Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---|---|---|
| `/axochat` | Main command | `axochat.command.main` |
| `/axochat reload` | Reload configuration | `axochat.command.reload` |
| `/msg` | Private message | `axochat.command.msg` |
| `/r` | Reply to last message | `axochat.command.reply` |
| `/ignore` | Ignore player | `axochat.command.ignore` |
| `/spy` | Spy on private messages | `axochat.command.spy` |
| `/broadcast` | Global announcement | `axochat.command.broadcast` |
| `/clearchat` | Clears chat | `axochat.command.clearchat` |

## 🛠️ Additional Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|---|---|
| `axochat.joinmessage` | View join messages |
| `axochat.quitmessage` | View quit messages |
| `axochat.silentjoin` | Join silently |
| `axochat.silentquit` | Leave silently |
| `axochat.bypass.caps` | Bypass caps filter |
| `axochat.bypass.advertising` | Bypass advertising filter |
| `axochat.bypass.wordfilter` | Bypass word filter |
| `axochat.mentions.notify` | Receive mentions |
| `axochat.chat.spy` | Spy on private messages |
| `axochat.report.receive` | Receive reports |
